tests.name: init_sh_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh completed (heredoc with extra '3' answers absorbed by tool resolution loop; project artifacts created)

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install.sh executes; not re-run here as it requires its own invocation; framework clone present implies path

framework_bugs.summary: init.sh has no scriptable mode for UAT — heredoc driver fragile
framework_bugs.reproduction: bash init.sh <<EOF ... canned answers ... EOF; the tool-resolution phase repeatedly prompts and rejects extra '3' answers as 'Invalid choice'
framework_bugs.expected: init.sh should accept --non-interactive or scripted answers cleanly without rejecting
framework_bugs.actual: Tool resolution loop emitted ~100 'Invalid choice' messages while consuming filler input; project still scaffolded but log is noisy and behavior is fragile

documentation_gaps.gap: init.sh exposes only --dry-run/--help; UAT runbook references hypothetical --non-interactive/--project flags that don't exist
documentation_gaps.where: init.sh argument parser; RUNBOOK.md Section A note

tests.name: baseline_phase2_advanced
tests.details: Manually advanced phase-state.json .current_phase to 2 to enable --start-feature (Section F prerequisite)

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: build_loop steps tests_written, tests_verified_failing, implemented, security_audit, documentation_updated, feature_recorded all completed sequentially

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit succeeded for feat(uat-baseline) after build loop completion

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero

tests.name: process_state_preserved

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: Created .claude/pending-approval.json with valid schema; ran upgrade-project.sh --track full; upgrade ran to completion (exit 0) without warning or refusing. BL-015 sentinel not enforced in upgrade-project.sh.

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh header lists 'BL-006 (2026-04-24)' and 'BL-015 (2026-04-25)' changelog entries

framework_bugs.summary: upgrade-project.sh --to-production fails immediately when intake-progress.json missing
framework_bugs.reproduction: 1) bash init.sh and complete a Sponsored POC project. 2) cd into project. 3) bash $FRAMEWORK/scripts/upgrade-project.sh --to-production
framework_bugs.expected: Upgrade detects POC mode from phase-state.json (which has .poc_mode='sponsored_poc') and proceeds.
framework_bugs.actual: Script aborts with '[FAIL] Project is not in POC mode'. CURRENT_POC_MODE is read only from .claude/intake-progress.json (lines 188-198 of upgrade-project.sh), but init.sh does NOT create intake-progress.json — it stores poc_mode only in phase-state.json. Result: the upgrade flow is broken for any project created by init.sh that needs to upgrade out of POC mode. Workaround: manually create .claude/intake-progress.json with poc_mode/deployment fields.

framework_bugs.reproduction: 1) Create .claude/pending-approval.json with valid schema. 2) Run bash $FRAMEWORK/scripts/upgrade-project.sh --track full
framework_bugs.expected: Upgrade refuses or at least warns about the pending approval (consistent with BL-015 sentinel which blocks commits/PRs).
framework_bugs.actual: Upgrade proceeds to completion with exit 0; no mention of pending-approval.json in any output. BL-015 enforcement does not extend to upgrade flows.

documentation_gaps.gap: init.sh's contract with upgrade-project.sh is undocumented: init writes poc_mode to phase-state.json; upgrade reads poc_mode from intake-progress.json. Either init must also write intake-progress.json or upgrade must fall back to phase-state.json.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: git ls-files | xargs grep for '(password|api_key|secret|token)\s*[:=]\s*[A-Za-z0-9_-]{16,}' (excluding template/doc paths) returned no hits. Keyword-only matches in known-stdlib, docs, and framework templates are expected/documented references, not real secret values.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — no FORCE/reset events occurred during this UAT run; .claude/process-audit.log absent as expected

summary: Sponsored-POC -> Production upgrade flow blocked by missing intake-progress.json (init.sh never writes it); after manual workaround upgrade completes cleanly and preserves phase/process/feature state. Pending-approval sentinel not honored in upgrade-project.sh.
